parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'scrape_status' = 'enriched' THEN 1 END) as enriched,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'scrape_status' = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'scrape_status' = 'failed_retry' THEN 1 END) as failed_retry,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'scrape_status' = 'enriched' AND data->>'retry_at' IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as fixed_by_retry,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'tier' = 'tier1' THEN 1 END) as tier1,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'tier' = 'tier2' THEN 1 END) as tier2,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN data->>'tier' = 'tier3' THEN 1 END) as tier3,
  MIN(created_at) as started_at,
  MAX(updated_at) as last_updated,
  ROUND(AVG((data->>'fields_extracted')::numeric), 1) as avg_fields,
  ROUND(AVG((data->>'scrape_duration_ms')::numeric)/1000, 1) as avg_sec
FROM companies_raw
WHERE source = 'n8n_datosperu_v6';

SELECT ruc, razon_social,
  data->>'scrape_status' as status,
  data->>'fields_extracted' as fields,
  data->>'tier' as tier,
  data->>'nro_trabajadores' as trabajadores,
  updated_at
FROM companies_raw
WHERE source = 'n8n_datosperu_v6'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT ruc, razon_social,
  data->>'scrape_status' as status,
  data->>'scrape_error' as error,
  data->>'prev_error' as prev_error,
  data->>'retry_at' as retry_at
FROM companies_raw
WHERE source = 'n8n_datosperu_v6'
  AND data->>'scrape_status' IN ('failed', 'failed_retry')
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
